text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
409 
REDUCED_PREICL_CS 
LABEL: 
Plan Offers Reduced Pre-ICL Cost-sharing Amount 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan offers reduced cost sharing applies to the pre-Initial Coverage 
Limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: REDUCED_PREICL_CS 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 

N = No 

9 = Not applicable
